name: Chicken Vegetable Noodle Soup
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Can low sodium chicken broth
5 pounds Cut up chicken with bones (about 5 lbs) SKINNED
16 ounces Can tomatoes cut up or 2 large fresh tomatoes cut up
(I use one fresh tomato and 1/4 cup Hot salsa)
16 ounces Bag frozen corn or mixed vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, combine water, chicken, onion, and bay leaf with pepper to taste.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat.
3. Cover and simmer for about half an hour.
4. Remove the cooked chicken and skim off any fat from the broth.
5. Add the drained tomatoes (undrained), corn, zucchini, and mushrooms to the broth.
6. Stir in the noodles and add the cubed chicken back into the pot.
7. Reduce heat and cover the pot.
8. Simmer until the noodles are tender and the mixture is cooked through.
9. Season with pepper to taste.
